chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-649 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 5 and reply as at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 08.9.2025 Mr. Mujahid Ali advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Mr. Siraj Ali Khan, Additional PG Ms. Saima Anjum advocate for respondents No.4 and 5 Mr. Raza Mian, DSP (Legal-II) CPO Inspector Mazhar Iqbal, SHO, PS KIA, Karachi SI Muhammad Tariq, PS KIA, Karachi -------------------------------- Detenue Hameed son of Muhammad Rahim Solangi has been produced by the police officials before this Court; therefore, the purpose of filing this petition has been served. However, no harassment shall be caused to each other. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Zahid/*
